_comment: L7 Connector Registry v0. All integrations are MCP servers; ATLAS core speaks one protocol. Existing MCP servers are reused, never rebuilt (R8). Installing a connector is MINOR-level -> requires Owner approval.

proposed.name: Calendar
proposed.rationale: A voice-first assistant is asked 'what's next' constantly; no calendar = blind.

proposed.name: Email
proposed.rationale: Daily office work centers on email triage, summarize, and draft.

proposed.name: Web Search
proposed.rationale: Research and live facts require web access; everything else is local.
